product.title: Estée Lauder Double Wear 24-Hour Maximum Cover Camouflage Foundation for Face and Body SPF 15 | Full Coverage | Tattoo Cover Up Makeup Waterproof, 1.0 Fl Oz

primaryFeatures.color: 2C5 Creamy Tan - Light-medium with rosy undertones

featureBullets: TOTAL COVERAGE + MATTE FINISH: Long-wearing, flawless face & body foundation, formulated with almost 30% pigment. Provides full, concealing matte coverage wherever you need it.
24-HOUR LONG WEAR: Lasts all day. Natural-looking. Waterproof. Matte finish. Soothing liquid-creme foundation, available in shades for all skintones.

FLAWLESS ALL DAY: Use it to camouflage all skin imperfections and flaws on your face or body, including scars, tattoos, spider veins, sun spots and other hyperpigmentation. Plus, it helps protect with SPF 15.
FORMULA FACTS: For all skintypes and in shades for all skintones. Dermatologist-tested. Non-acnegenic—won’t clog pores or cause breakouts. Waterproof. 24-hour wear. SPF 15.

HIGH-PERFORMANCE LONGWEAR: Discover the complete Double Wear Collection. From our #1 foundation, to concealer, eye liners and more, it's makeup that keeps up with your busy day. The flawless look you see in the morning is the look you keep all day.

specification.value: 2C5 Creamy Tan - Light-medium with rosy undertones
Natural-looking. Waterproof. Matte finish. Soothing liquid-cream foundation, available in shades for all skintones.
#6,564 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #81 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation provides excellent coverage, particularly for tattoos and melasma, and appreciate its longevity, noting it stays all day without oxidizing. The texture receives mixed feedback - while some say it doesn't feel heavy or cakey, others mention it can look heavy on the skin. Customers disagree on the color match, with some finding it perfect while others say it's darker than expected, and opinions on value are divided between those who find it well worth the price and those who consider it too expensive. The foundation applies smoothly and goes a long way.

reviews.reviewText: A single layer was enough to make my tattoo virtually invisible without the use of colour correction or setting products. Stayed put throughout the day with little changes, again without any setting. Safe to say it’s perfect for long wear. It feels light and breathable on the skin and the colour match for me was perfect. Exactly what I needed it to be - a super effective and with minimal effort tattoo concealer. Worth every penny. My advice would be to try on the foundation or look to their website to see the colour against your skin. I got the shade 4N2, after checking on the original website. I was concerned it would be too dark for my tone, as it does look MUCH darker on the palette in product pics. Instead it was actually pretty light coming out the bottle and a perfect match.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 10, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Nice coverage but way too light for me. If you can get a color match to your skin, seems like a great foundation. I like full coverage and this is that, it’s pricey though. Which is okay since product is good, but I tried and failed twice to match my color, both times I chose too light.
